meaning: n.水泥,接合剂vt.接合,用水泥涂,巩固vi.粘牢
examples: A puppy stepped in the fresh cement.
He had spent several hours mixing cement.
Concrete is a mixture of sand and cement.
The cement industry is largely controlled by one player--Cemex--and its billionaire chief, Lorenzo Zambrano.
Once when I was a little boy I received as a gift a toy cement mixer.
